creator: stephen_roome@yahoo.com
text:
Just been taking it upon myself to look at some old PR's ...

And this one appears to have been fixed some time ago as SIGEV_NONE is
no longer in any aio.h I can find, but is in the appropriate signal.h
headers.

So, can/should this pr be closed now, perhaps with the consent of the
originator ?

If someone thinks that it's not helpful to suggest old PR's be closed
then please email me, otherwise I'll probably be sending in some more
suggestions to close things soon.

	Steve Roome
